---
name: official-research
description: Researches official PowerBuilder, VS Code, LSP, Copilot or build documentation before changing uncertain behavior.
---

# Official Research

## Use when
Use when behavior depends on official docs or uncertainty exists.

## Workflow
1. Prefer official docs and representative repositories.
2. Record URLs and applicability.
3. Do not paste long copyrighted text.
4. Convert findings into concise implementation rules.
5. Mark unresolved uncertainty.

## Output
- Findings or changes required
- Tests/docs affected
- Validation commands/results
- Remaining risks or unknowns
